arts.ttl: Football news: Arsenal striker boost as Bournemouth star's price tag revealed
arts.sum: A number of Premier League clubs including Manchester United, Arsenal and Liverpool are interested in adding to their attacks this summer with Antoine Semenyo and Viktor Gyokeres among those who could be on the move

arts.ttl: What Real Madrid have now done in talks to sign Zubimendi as Berta thinks he'll sign for Arsenal - journalist
Three ways Arsenal can line-up without Thomas Partey vs PSG
arts.sum: Possible XI: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Kiwior, Lewis-Skelly; Odegaard, Jorginho, Rice; Saka, Merino, Martinelli. With injuries across the squad - but mainly in defence and attack - the midfield has become a pillar for Arsenal's chances in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta confirms major striker boost after Viktor Gyokeres statement
arts.sum: Arsenal have a Champions League semi-final against Paris Saint-Germain to consider next month and boss Mikel Arteta has revealed what could be a considerable boost for his side

arts.ttl: Williams sends Man Utd message amid Arsenal transfer links and Simons 'contact'
arts.sum: Arsenal are keeping tabs on several players before the summer transfer window opens with Mikel Arteta and Andrea Berta looking to strengthen in a number of areas. football.london says: As an exciting talent capable of playing in several attacking positions, Simons could be the perfect addition for Arteta at Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Predicted Lineup vs. Ipswich Town: Premier League
arts.sum: Arsenal visit Ipswich Town looking to avoid Liverpool lifting the Premier League title this weekend.

arts.ttl: Ipswich vs Arsenal: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Ipswich host Arsenal in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Jakub Kiwior Arsenal exit discussed as 'suspect' claim made after Real Madrid heroics
arts.sum: Arsenal journalist Charles Watts discusses Jakub Kiwior's future at the club after his heroic performances against Real Madrid in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Osimhen agreement reached as striker chooses Arsenal
arts.sum: Plus, Viktor Gyokeres chose his ideal next club and Arsenal were told that they are signing the 'Lionel Messi of goalkeepers.' There's plenty to cover, so let's jump right in. Viktor Gyokeres favours a move to Arsenal over Chelsea .

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins fires Arsenal transfer message as Unai Emery makes costly Aston Villa mistake
arts.sum: He said: "Obviously, being out of the team, no one's happy to sit on the bench when you're a professional player and you always want to play in the starting lineup. On Saturday afternoon, Watkins finally returned to the starting lineup, firing Aston Villa to a 4-1 win over Newcastle United.
